title: MessageEntry
description: Normalized message shape used in SessionDetail.messages. The 'type' field is a normalized discriminator: 'tool_use' when the assistant content has any tool_use block; 'tool_result' when user content has any tool_result block; otherwise 'user'/'assistant'/'system'.

id.description: Entry uuid from the JSONL, or a generated UUID when missing.

content.description: Original message content. Plain string for text messages, or structured content blocks for tool_use/tool_result.

toolUseResult.description: Optional result payload attached to tool_use messages.

model.description: Model that produced the message (assistant messages only).

parentUuid.description: uuid of the preceding message in the transcript.

parentToolUseId.description: For sidechain messages, the Agent tool_use_id that spawned them.

isSidechain.description: True when the message belongs to an Agent/Task sidechain.
